title: How to enable architecture in SonarQube Cloud
markdown:
# Enabling Architecture in SonarQube Cloud

## Introduction

SonarQube Cloud offers comprehensive tools for managing code quality and security across organizations. One important feature that administrators can enable is the architecture module, which helps teams visualize and manage the structural design of their codebase. This guide walks through the straightforward process of activating architecture features within SonarQube Cloud.

## Prerequisites for Enabling Architecture

To enable architecture in SonarQube Cloud, users must have administrator privileges within their organization. This requirement ensures that only authorized personnel can modify organizational settings and access advanced configuration options. Those without admin status will not be able to complete this process.

## Step-by-Step Configuration Process

The process to enable architecture is remarkably simple and requires just a few clicks. First, users should sign into their SonarQube Cloud account and navigate to the organization where they hold administrator rights. From there, accessing the administration section reveals the architecture configuration option. A checkbox labeled for architecture enablement will be visible, which must be checked to activate the feature. After selecting the checkbox, users need to save their changes to complete the setup.

## Conclusion

Enabling architecture in SonarQube Cloud is an efficient way to unlock advanced code structure analysis and visualization capabilities for development teams. With the proper administrative access and by following these straightforward steps, organizations can quickly incorporate architectural analysis into their code quality workflows.

## Key Takeaways

- Administrator privileges are required to enable architecture features in SonarQube Cloud
- The architecture feature is enabled through the organization's administration section
- A single checkbox controls the architecture feature activation
- Changes must be saved after enabling the architecture option
- The entire process takes minimal time to complete
